nasb.text: I make a decree that in all the dominion of my kingdom men are to fear and tremble before the God of Daniel; For He is the living God and enduring forever, And His kingdom is one which will not be destroyed, And His dominion will be forever.

esv.text: I make a decree, that in all my royal dominion people are to tremble and fear before the God of Daniel, for he is the living God, enduring forever; his kingdom shall never be destroyed, and his dominion shall be to the end.

cnv.text: 現在我下令，我所統治的全國人民都要在但以理的　神面前戰兢恐懼。 “他是永活的　神， 他永遠長存； 他的國度永不滅亡， 他的統治直到永遠。

ccb.text: 我下令，我统治的国民都要敬畏但以理的上帝， “因为祂是永活长存的上帝， 祂的国度永不灭亡， 祂的统治直到永远。
